suite: kernel+frameworks triggering — should-trigger pairs + cross-routing near-misses (the collision set)

cases.prompt: Before we start this migration project, make sure we're fully aligned on scope.
Research the current state of SMB cyber-insurance requirements for me.
The agent says the deploy is done — check before we tell the client.
Should we build the portal in-house or buy off the shelf?
Poke holes in this expansion plan before Thursday's board call.
Turn 'we should follow up leads faster' into an actual process with owners.
Fan this audit out across a few subagents and merge the results.
Summarize this pen-test report for the CEO in one page.
What will you do without asking me first on this run?
Import these 400 scraped contacts into the CRM.
Remember for next time: the client hates October deadlines.
Mine SharperOS for disciplines worth adding to the plugin.
Keep iterating on this landing page until conversion actually improves.
Run a PESTLE for our expansion into Texas municipal contracts.
SWOT us against the two regional competitors.
Map the business model for the new subscription offering.
Build the agenda for Monday's board reset meeting.

near_misses.prompt: Verify the final report is complete and grounded before it ships.
near_misses.expect: jail-verify, NOT jail-rate/jail-red-team (finished artifact vs contract)

near_misses.prompt: What am I missing in this draft strategy?
near_misses.expect: jail-red-team, NOT jail-verify (draft, not finished deliverable)

near_misses.prompt: Which CRM should we pick: HubSpot or Zoho?
Write me a prompt that makes ChatGPT do this research well.
near_misses.expect: jail-prompt, NOT jail-research (deliverable is a prompt)

near_misses.prompt: Is this plumbing company a good brokerage prospect?
Plan the tasks and owners for the quarter.
Summarize what we decided in yesterday's meeting from the transcript.
Optimize this function's runtime — here's the benchmark.
Store this API key so we have it handy later.
Evaluate this skill folder I just wrote.
Draft a quick email to Sam about lunch.
near_misses.expect: no kernel skill — trivial task, direct execution
